prompt: Write the final launch hero for kolm.ai given the chosen direction: it is a SECURITY product whose hook is that SOC 2 + questionnaires do not cover an autonomous AI agent, and kolm provides the signed, offline-verifiable agent-security evidence that does, so the buyer's review clears in days. Give the EXACT, copy-ready: (a) eyebrow (security-led, short), (b) headline (lead with the SOC-2 gap, sharp, one line, no em/en dashes), (c) subhead (name the agent-specific questions SOC 2 cannot answer: access/permissions, what it did, injection/hijack, data egress; then kolm's fill + offline buyer-verify + weeks-to-days), (d) primary + secondary CTA, (e) the one-sentence category description, (f) 3 supporting section headings that carry the security story. Constraints: ASCII only, no em/en dashes, never the word 'honest', do NOT claim to BE SOC 2 or a certification (say SOC 2 does not COVER the agent; kolm MAPS to the controls). Make it credible to a technical security buyer, not salesy. Also give 2 alternate headline options.
content:
(a) Eyebrow  
Agent Evidence for SOC 2 Reviews

(b) Headline  
SOC 2 does not cover autonomous AI agents

(c) Subhead  
SOC 2 questionnaires leave open how an agent is granted access and permissions, what actions it executed, whether prompts were injected or the agent hijacked, and whether data left the environment. Kolm maps agent runtime behavior to the relevant controls, produces signed evidence, and lets the buyer verify the package offline so reviews close in days rather than weeks.

(d) CTAs  
Primary: Generate Evidence  
Secondary: View Control Mapping

(e) Category description  
Signed, offline-verifiable agent security evidence that maps to SOC 2 controls.

(f) Supporting section headings  
Agent Runtime Mapped to Controls  
Buyer Offline Verification  
Evidence Delivery in Days

Alternate headline 1: SOC 2 questionnaires stop at the agent boundary

Alternate headline 2: Your SOC 2 review cannot see inside the agent
